title: exostigma notobellidiastrum
intro: Exostigma notobellidiastrum is a type of plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the staff vine family. It is used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Exostigma notobellidiastrum include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
